title: MERCH Oh boy official evangelion tarot cards
display_title: MERCH Oh boy official evangelion tarot cards
wikitext:
[]: [MERCH] Oh boy, "official" evangelion tarot cards.             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Mar 05, 2009 6:32 am http://www.evamonkey.com/2009/02/evangelion-rebuild-tarot-cards.php Yeah, this is yet another obvious cash-in, but the symbology of a few are kind of cool: http://www.1999.co.jp/itbig08/10084468a2.jpg Not commenting on the above might make this seem offtopic for the board, but it's obvious enough that I don't have more to say.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Mar 05, 2009 11:49 am Why the crap is Shinji holding a sword?! Also, is Kaworu's card supposed to symbolise something? Edit: It's things like this I wish there was an emoticon symbolising "milking the cash cow".

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:19 pm EvaMonkey posted them his website. I think they look awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Mar 05, 2009 2:51 pm Funny how the "lovers" are Hikari and Toji when their relationship plays a relatively minor part in the story compared to everyone else's.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:21 pm kaworu's sitting on the white moon and touching the black moon.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:27 pm One of the few things I've -- accumulated is probably a better word than collected -- over the years is various divination decks; the idea of an Eva Tarot was the sort of thing that might actually get me into non-DVD merch... But from these samples , the symbolism is well awry -- Rei should be The Moon, while Kaworu perhaps be the Holy Fool; in fact almost every card, I would reassign.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:57 pm ^ agreed. Also, why the hell does Kaworu rate 3 cards while Asuka and Shinji each only get 1 and all evas other than 01 get no representation at all? Epic fail.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Mar 05, 2009 4:09 pm As lovely an empress Asuka is... next to Gendo as emperor...? *shudder*

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Mar 05, 2009 4:19 pm Asuka empress is hot. She certainly has the dominating air an empress should have.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 05, 2009 5:04 pm I remember seeing this on Evastore a month back. While Eva Tarot cards are a cool concept, I think more thought should have been put into what characters truly fit what role; I agree with Oji-chan's thoughts on the subject. It is amusing (but cute) how Toji and Hikari get "the lovers" card.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Mar 05, 2009 6:55 pm If I was assigning cards, it would be more like this: The Fool - Shinji (happy) The Magician - Ritsuko and the Magi The High Priestess - Yui The Empress - Lilith The Emperor - Gendo The Hierophant - Fuyutsuki The Lovers - Kaji and Misato The Chariot - Jet Alone Strength - Unit 02 The Hermit - Shinji (depressed) Wheel of Fortune - Tree of Life, Harpies Justice - Unit 01 The Hanged Man - Kaworu Death - Unit 03 Temperance - Unit 00 The Devil - Keel and SEELE The Tower - NERV HQ and bridge bunnies The Star - alignment of earth, moon, sun, and 01 The Moon - Rei The Sun - Asuka Judgment - Adam and various angels The World - Keepsake photo / "Congratulations!"

[]:             Quote Post by Shogoki-KiriKai » Thu Mar 05, 2009 7:39 pm I kinda want these. Not gonna buy em though... *Opens Photoshop and buys more photoprinter ink*

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Mar 05, 2009 10:06 pm I seen these before and their pretty cool. I doubt I will buy them though.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Thu Mar 05, 2009 11:13 pm NemZ wrote: If I was assigning cards, it would be more like this: The Fool - Shinji (happy) The Magician - Ritsuko and the Magi The High Priestess - Yui The Empress - Lilith The Emperor - Gendo The Hierophant - Fuyutsuki The Lovers - Kaji and Misato The Chariot - Jet Alone Strength - Unit 02 The Hermit - Shinji (depressed) Wheel of Fortune - Tree of Life, Harpies Justice - Unit 01 The Hanged Man - Kaworu Death - Unit 03 Temperance - Unit 00 The Devil - Keel and SEELE The Tower - NERV HQ and bridge bunnies The Star - alignment of earth, moon, sun, and 01 The Moon - Rei The Sun - Asuka Judgment - Adam and various angels The World - Keepsake photo / "Congratulations!"

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Mar 06, 2009 2:05 am Huh... so Rei gets both star platinum and za warudo.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 06, 2009 2:40 am MatrixRefugee wrote: I like! What would the four suits be, though?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 06, 2009 2:52 am A top of my head stab at a deck The Fool - Kaworu standing on the angel sculpture, stepping into air The Magician - Gendo standing at his desk (as per the Waite tarot), with the Adam sample as paraphenalia The High Priestess - Ritsuko at her desk The Empress - Yui in plug suit The Emperor - Keel The Hierophant - Fuyutsuki The Lovers - Kaji and Misato The Chariot - Entry plug Strength - EVA-02 forcing Gaghiel's jaws open The Hermit - EVA-00 in the cage Wheel of Fortune - EVA-01 on the Tree of Life Justice - The MAGI The Hanged Man - Shinji sitting at the suicide spot Death - The LnY in flight, skies clearing behind/beneath it Temperance - Gendo with his hand in Rei's breast The Devil - SEELE monolith, w/Gendo and Ritsuko chained The Tower - NERV pyramid and Zeruel The Star - Shinji in his chair, sitting up with an expression of surprise on his face, with Asuka and Rei behind him (episode 26 composite) The Moon - Rei with the moon as backdrop (episode 6) The Sun - Asuka in summer dress, the sun at her back (episode 8) Judgment - Adam spreading vis wings at 2nd Impact The World - Shekinah holding the Black Moon As for the minor trumps -- apart from using the LnY for wands and the harpy-style double-blades for swords, no real thought.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Mar 06, 2009 3:13 am NemZ wrote: MatrixRefugee wrote: I like! What would the four suits be, though?

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Fri Mar 06, 2009 7:32 pm NemZ wrote: If I was assigning cards, it would be more like this: <snip>

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 06, 2009 9:11 pm I'd revise it to be Adam just before second impact, with the last few expedition members reacting in various ways below the giant of light.
